summary: Completed comprehensive mobile optimization testing at 375px width (iPhone SE). Mobile responsiveness is working well with hamburger menu, full-width buttons, responsive grids, and proper stacking. Found minor horizontal overflow on Partners page and submit button width issue on Contact page.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor horizontal overflow detected (379px vs 375px viewport)
Submit button not full-width on mobile (277px width)

passed_tests: Homepage loads at 375px width without horizontal scroll
Hamburger menu appears on mobile instead of full nav
Mobile menu opens with slide animation and shows all nav items vertically
Services submenu expands to show sub-items
Hero CTA buttons are full-width on mobile
Service cards stack in single column on mobile
Stats bar shows 2x2 grid on mobile
Our Model page phase cards stack vertically
Partners filter bar is horizontally scrollable on mobile
Footer columns stack vertically and center-align on mobile
Calendly button properly hidden on mobile (hidden sm:flex)
Contact page cards stack in single column
Form inputs have 16px font size to prevent iOS zoom
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor horizontal overflow on Partners page (4px overflow) and make Contact form submit button full-width on mobile. Both are low-priority cosmetic issues.
